title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

questions.question: Is it true that we are more connected but more lonely than ever before?
What is the best way to integrate new people into a local community?

script.text: Is it true that we are more connected but more lonely than ever before?
What is the best way to integrate new people into a local community?
How important is it to have friends who have different opinions from our own?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
